name: dp/faq-accordion
title: FAQ Accordion
description: Collapsible FAQ items with schema markup.

default.question: How long does a typical painting project take?
default.answer: Most interior projects take 2-5 days. Exterior projects depend on weather but typically 3-7 days. We provide a detailed timeline with every quote.

default.question: Do you provide free quotes?
default.answer: Yes, all quotes are 100% free with no obligation. We visit your property, assess the work required, and provide a detailed fixed-price quote within 24 hours.

default.question: What areas of Dublin do you cover?
default.answer: We cover all of Dublin city and county, including Howth, Malahide, Dun Laoghaire, Blackrock, Castleknock, and towns within a 30km radius.

default.question: Are you fully insured?
default.answer: Yes, we carry 2M euro Public Liability insurance and all our painters are Safe Pass certified. You are fully protected on every project.

default.question: What paint brands do you use?
default.answer: We primarily use Dulux and Fleetwood premium paints. We can accommodate specific brand requests and offer expert colour consultation to help you choose the perfect finish.
